name: libdata-perl-perl
title: libdata-perl-perl
summary: classes wrapping fundamental Perl data types
description:
classes wrapping fundamental Perl data types
Data::Perl is a collection of classes that wrap fundamental data types that
exist in Perl. These classes and methods as they exist today are an attempt
to mirror functionality provided by Moose's Native Traits. One important
thing to note is all classes currently do no validation on constructor input.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdata-perl-perl because classes wrapping fundamental Perl data types.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdata-perl-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdata-perl-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdata-perl-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
